text:
What is Dwell Time?
Dwell time = how long an operation waits in MongoDB's execution queue before processir
Operation arrives → [WAIT IN QUEUE] → Processing begins
L dwell time
Calculated as:
per_ticket.
_micros = total
rate = total
_time_queued
_delta / tickets_processed_delta
_time_queued
_delta / wall_time_delta
High dwell time = operations piling up = server can't keep up = rate limit kicks in.
